name_en: Top-tier Replica [Exclusive Photo M12367 Cement Grey] This Rosalie coin purse features Monogram canvas and bright grained leather lining, with a compact structure that hides ample space. It includes a fan-fold divider, card slots, and a coin purse with a leather pull tab. 11 x 8 x 2.5 cm (Length x Height x Width)
